basic_details.job_title: DIC Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Digital India Corporation (DIC) has officially announced the Assistant Manager – HR Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria (please refer to the official notification) and hold a Bachelor’s degree from a reputed university/institution, with MBA/Postgraduate degree in HR desirable, can now submit their online applications from now until 21 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree from a reputed university / institution. MBA/Postgraduate degree in HR is desirable.
qualification.details: Assistant Manager – HR: Bachelor's degree from a reputed university / institution. MBA/Postgraduate degree in HR is desirable. 2+ years of experience in HR with a preference to having prior experience of working in a Govt /NGO set up.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Screening of applications will be based on qualifications and relevant experience. Shortlisted candidates shall be invited for interviews.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DIC Assistant Manager – HR Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DIC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DIC Assistant Manager – HR recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Assistant Manager – HR position at Digital India Corporation is 21st May 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Assistant Manager – HR post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree from a recognized university or institution. An MBA or a postgraduate degree in HR is considered desirable for this role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any specific experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, applicants need to have at least 2 years of experience in Human Resources. Prior experience working in a Government or NGO setup is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager – HR post?
faq.answer: Digital India Corporation is recruiting for a total of 2 vacancies for the Assistant Manager – HR position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DIC Assistant Manager – HR recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official portal.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of employment for this role?
faq.answer: The positions are offered on a Contract/ Consolidated basis, meaning the employment is for a fixed term as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q7. Where is Digital India Corporation located?
faq.answer: The Digital India Corporation is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110003. The recruitment is open for candidates across India.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Manager – HR role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications based on qualifications and experience. Shortlisted candidates will then be invited for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no mention of an application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any part of India apply?
faq.answer: Yes, this recruitment is open to eligible candidates from across India. The job location is primarily in New Delhi.
